PLO1: Understand fundamental knowledge of social sciences, politics, law, and national defense, contributing to the formation of a scientific worldview and methodology.
PLO2: Apply solid foundational knowledge in the field of IT in general and Artificial Intelligence (AI) in particular to understand the professional context and acquire in-depth specialized knowledge Artificial Intelligence (AI).
PLO3: Apply Artificial Intelligence (AI) and data science to build intelligent systems that can adapt to a variety of real-world scenarios
PLO4: Have basic knowledge of planning and management, implementation, and monitoring the execution of plans for professional work in the field of Artificial Intelligence (AI).
PLO5: Have a startup mindset and be able to apply entrepreneurial knowledge and skills to implement a startup project; have a creative mindset, research skills, critical thinking, and problem-solving skills.
PLO6: Have intermediate English proficiency equivalent to level 4 according to the 6-level foreign language proficiency framework used in Vietnam; and can communicate simply in Japanese.
PLO7: Have the ability to communicate and present to clearly articulate the problem to be solved and to convey knowledge and skills when performing specific/complex professional tasks related to Artificial Intelligence (AI).
PLO8: Have the ability to program and use simulation tools in the field of Artificial Intelligence (AI).
PLO9: Have the ability to update and exploit advanced tools and techniques in the field of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in particular and IT in general.
PLO10: Develop the ability to work independently as well as effectively in a team in both academic and practical environments; take personal responsibility and responsibility for the group when performing a professional task. Have a self-learning spirit, lifelong learning, and adaptability to the continuous changes of technology and society.
PLO11: Behave professionally, ethically, have social responsibility and a spirit of community service; have professional responsibility and integrity in work.
PLO12: Be strong in spirit and physically, demonstrate national identity, and be confident in international integration.
PLO13: Be able to plan, coordinate, and manage resources related to Artificial Intelligence (AI) projects; guide and supervise the implementation of project tasks and, at the same time, have the ability to evaluate project effectiveness and propose feasible and effective solutions for improvement.
